title: Simply Handheld
description: A Modpack of handheld capabilities like MSI Claw or Steam Deck
body:
# Simply Handheld

A Modpack for handheld gaming devices like the Steam deck or MSI Claw without needing a keyboard and mouse. Although it is built and enhanced for the handhelds, it can still be used for laptops and PCs. It uses controllify for the controls and sodium for enhanced FPS

![Simply Conrtolled on my Laptop connected a Switch Controller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f403e81d108fcbd679d7a43c9898fcd1ea60b936.png)
